Marcus_Mobile_Plumber.notes: Owner account — mobile plumber, sends estimates and invoices from phone between jobs

Diane_Office_Manager.notes: Office manager account — desktop user, handles billing follow-up and payment recording

Sofia_Event_Organizer.notes: Owner account — event organizer, creates proposals and invoices, manages client email

Rachel_Event_Assistant.notes: Assistant account — limited role, drafts estimates and handles email inquiries

Carlos_CPA.notes: Owner/CPA account — full access, manages multiple client books, runs reports

Martha_Tax_Assistant.notes: Bookkeeper assistant — standard access, handles client bookkeeping tasks daily
